g++ -std=c++17 -O3  -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.1 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libemdw.dylib -install_name @rpath/libemdw.dylib "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-base/emdw.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-beliefprop/lbp_cg.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-beliefprop/lbu2_cg.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-beliefprop/lbu_cg.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-beliefprop/messagequeue.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-beliefprop/lbu_sweep.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-clustering/mojo.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-factors/affinemvg.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-factors/factor.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-factors/factoroperator.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-factors/sqrtmvg.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-factors/treefactor.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-graphing/bronkerbosch.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/emdw-graphing/clustergraph.cc.o" CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/affinemvg.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/bronkerbosch.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/conditionalpolya.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/dirichlet.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/dirichletset.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/discretetable.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/polya.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/sigmapoints.test.cc.o CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/test/sqrtmvg.test.cc.o "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-informationtheory/inftheory.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-matrix/mathfuncs.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-matrix/matops.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-matrix/v2vtransform.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-misc/colourmap.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-misc/combinations.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-misc/oddsandsods.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/emdw.dir/utils-sigmapoints/sigmapoints.cc.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/taros/bin /Users/taros/bin/libgLinear.dylib /Users/taros/bin/libprlite.dylib -llapack -lblas -lssl -lcrypto -lz
